name: react-esm-frontend
description: Browser dependencies for the react-esm example. React + react-dom ship CommonJS-only, so they can't be served as native ESM; build.rs installs this tree into node_modules/ with npm-utils, then bundles it CJS->ESM with web-modules' `bundle` feature (rolldown). zustand is a separate dependency that itself imports React, proving a single shared React instance in the bundle.
